中文

Course Levels

Beginner: Flight Explorer Intermediate: Flight Engineer Advanced: Flight Scientist
Intermediate Level

Flight Engineer

Modify code, understand flight control algorithms

Requires basic C programming knowledge.
Duration: 1-2 months.

Note: The complete English tutorial is being translated. For full content, please check the Chinese version.

What You'll Learn

  • Code modification and compilation with ESP-IDF
  • PID controller tuning
  • Sensor data processing (MPU6050, BMP280)
  • Wi-Fi telemetry and real-time plotting
  • Ultrasonic obstacle avoidance
